main.description: A notification that the document author @mentioned an account in a fyi.requested.documentVersion. Lives on the document author's PDS. Discovered by the mentioned account via a Constellation backlink query keyed on `subject`. Idempotent per (document, subject): the author lists their own mentions before each write and skips duplicates.

subject.description: DID of the mentioned account. Indexed by Constellation so the subject can discover mentions of themselves across all authors.

document.description: AT-URI of the fyi.requested.document the mention appears in. Mutable target (the doc's currentVersion changes over time), so this is a plain at-uri rather than a strongRef.

version.description: Strong ref to the specific fyi.requested.documentVersion that introduced this mention. Immutable, so the CID is stable.

createdAt.description: When the mention record was written.
